title: EAST AFRICAN AND SOMALI CULTURALLY SPECIFIC SERVICES - 211info
text: SOMALI AMERICAN COUNCIL OF OREGON EAST AFRICAN AND SOMALI CULTURALLY SPECIFIC SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides advocacy and community services to the African immigrant and refugee community. 12409 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Email (503) 719-7679 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 719-7679 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: State or federally issued photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Maay Maay, Mahaa, Somali, Swahili AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: SE 122nd Avenue and Market Street. TriMet bus lines 20 and 73. Services: Ethnic Advocacy Groups * Somali Community Language Interpretation * Somali Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOMALI AMERICAN COUNCIL OF OREGON
